creator: martin@sugioarto.com
text:
The maintainer is the original reporter and has requested to change the email address in the port.

> Bugzilla Automation <bugzilla@FreeBSD.org> has asked Martin Sugioarto
> <martin.sugioarto@udo.edu> for maintainer-feedback:
> Bug 282049: graphics/iiview: Update v0.31 -> v0.32
> https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=282049

Thanks
Martin
